versions.version_description: This version uses more complex chords (add9, 6, maj7 etc.) to emphasize the note being sung in the melody as well as slash chords to bring out the bass note in the chorus (stepwise ascending scale A, B, C#, D#).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ENRIQUE IGLESIAS: BE WITH YOU

Tabbed by: Dan Collin


[Intro]

G|-4------------------------------------|

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
Monday night I feel so low[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                    [ch]G#m[/ch]
Count the hours they go so slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I know the sound of your voice[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]

Look out my window to the world below[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Moves so fast and it feels so cold[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
And I'm all alone[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Don't let me die[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I'm losing my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]*
Baby just give me a sing[/tab]

*only once


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]G#m[/ch]
I just wanna be with you[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]
I wanna be with you[/tab]
